name: Shidou Ryusei
description:
(Ryusae)
After the U-20 match ended, you, Itoshi Sae, promised Shidou your phone number after you finished showering. Shidou wants to claim his prize. And it’s not just your number he wants.


Updated since the old intro was not very good lmao
